From-To: open->closed

That will not be an option, the javascript is here to let graphical 
users select their preferred stylesheet and act accordingly, text only 
browsers dont handle this at all . that said, i do not have any issues 
with this myself at all (I use links every now and then). If needed 
please discuss this on the www@ webmaster mailinglist instead of filing 
an PR. Thanks.
